documentation.description:
COSE_Encrypt (RFC 9052 Section 5.1) — multi-recipient encryption.

Create: encrypts payload with ChaCha20-Poly1305, one direct recipient.
Add_Recipient: adds an additional direct-key recipient.
Open: decrypts and authenticates.
Encode: serializes a COSE_Encrypt message to CBOR.
Decode: parses CBOR into a COSE_Encrypt message.

subprograms.name: Add_Recipient
Create
Decode
Encode
Open
